title: TPA
description: Adds an easy way for players to teleport to each other!
body:
TPA

Adds an easy way for players to teleport to each other!

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/easy-tpa) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=000000&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tpa)[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=000000&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/etWwCMDGFH) TPA is available for NeoForge, Forge and Fabric. **IMPORTANT** This description is only valid for version `2.0.0` and up. It is for now only available for NeoForge and Forge, but Fabric 1.20.1-1.21.1 is coming **very** soon. ## CONFIGURATION Config location: * **NeoForge:** `config/TPA/config/configuration.toml` * **Forge:** `world/serverconfig/TPA/config/configuration.toml` * **Fabric:** `config/TPA/config/configuration.json` ## COMMANDS * /tpa - **\[Send a teleport request\]** * /tpaccept - **\[Accept a teleport request\]** * /tpatoggle - **\[Disable or enable teleport requests\]** * /tpahere - **\[Send a teleport here request\]** * /back - **\[Go back to your previous location\]** * /tpacancel - **\[Cancel your ongoing teleport request\]** ## MECHANICS You can send tpa requests with /tpa to a player to request teleporting to them. Request a tpahere request if you want the player to teleport to you. Both can be accepted with /tpaccept. Toggle your requests to allow receiving them or deny them automatically. Requests expire after a certain time, default 5 minutes. Teleporting or dying will set a back location for the player, they can teleport up to a certain number of back locations, configurable as well. You can cancel an outgoing request with /tpacancel. All text in the mod is translatable via resource/data packs, and everything is customizable. After teleporting, the player has a cooldown before they can do it again. [Kinetic Hosting](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=623) ![Kinetic Hosting](https://f0xmods.com/uploads/KH-CurseForge-FinalWideBanner-Small1.png)
